raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1362 requires all foreign labor recruiters to register with the Labor Commissioner in California.",
    "AB 1362 aims to close a loophole that currently excludes many temporary immigrant workers from protections against predatory recruitment tactics.",
    "The bill prohibits foreign labor recruiters from charging workers recruiting fees.",
    "AB 1362 specifies fair contractual terms in the recruiting and employment process.",
    "The legislation provides legal remedies for workers harmed by violations of the law by foreign labor recruiters and employers.",
    "AB 1362 outlaws retaliation against workers exercising their rights under the law.",
    "The bill imposes a bonding requirement on foreign labor recruiters to provide funds to cover violations."
  ]
}
